Goodbye

Out of the blue
like a lightning bolt
you shot vibrantly through my veins -
like a drug!

- like heroin...
Strange how
now
that you're gone my limbs shiver,
and my bones are wracked with pains.

Each shot, each high, your smile;
each flush and caress, every
blush of pleasure
whilst we were together...
tears up my guts:

there was only you.

1999

writing
